channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Ravyn Lenae Plots 2026 North American Tour
item.description: 🎶 Let's dance into the future with @ravynlenae's 2026 North American tour dates! Who's joining me? 🌟 #RavynLenaeTour2026

item.title: Liam Payne’s 9-Year-Old Son Named Sole Inheritor of Singer’s $29 Million Estate
item.description: 🎉 Rockstar in the making! Liam Payne’s son, Sole, inherits $29 million estate! 🤑✨ #NextGenStar #FamilyFortune

item.title: Tour News: Craig Finn, Soulwax, Dirty Projectors, Jensen McRae, Angelo De Augustine, Brian Fallon, more
item.description: 🌟 Tour alert! 🎸🎶 Exciting lineup featuring Craig Finn, Soulwax, Dirty Projectors, Jensen McRae, and more coming your way! 🎉 #livemusic #touring

item.title: Wild Pink share “Box Store” from upcoming LP, announce more fall tour dates
item.description: 🎶 New @WildPink track "Box Store" is a vibe! 🚀 Who's catching them on tour this fall? #MusicNews #WildPink #TourDates 🎸

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Is Throwing a Fest With an All-Women Lineup Featuring Bikini Kill, Chappell Roan, Doechii
item.description: 🔥 Let's celebrate girl power! Olivia Rodrigo's fest is going to be next level with this killer all-women lineup 💃✨ #GirlPowerFest
